compatibleScales.musicalContext: Contains all four chord tones. The B is a chord tone (maj7), making C Ionian the natural choice for Cmaj7 chords.
compatibleScales.commonUse: Complete freedom over Cmaj7. The quintessential maj7 scale. Perfect for jazz, pop, R&B, and contemporary music.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: Emphasize the maj7 (B) for sophisticated color. The F (11th) can be used but resolve to E or G. All tones work beautifully.

compatibleScales.musicalContext: The #4 (F#) avoids suspended sound of natural 11th. This is THE scale for Imaj7 in modern jazz and fusion.
compatibleScales.commonUse: The definitive modern Imaj7 scale. Essential for jazz, fusion, film music, and progressive styles. Creates sophisticated, ethereal maj7 color.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: The #11 (F#) is signature Lydian sound. Creates floating, dreamy quality. Essential for Cmaj7#11 voicings.

compatibleScales.musicalContext: Omits 4th and 7th for core consonance. Simpler maj7 approach perfect for melodic clarity and pop contexts.
compatibleScales.commonUse: Perfect for pop and R&B maj7 approaches. Creates smooth melodies without harmonic complexity. Ideal for vocal lines and memorable hooks.
compatibleScales.famousExamples: Very safe and melodic. Implies maj7 without stating it. Great for hooks and singable lines over Cmaj7.
